allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs\(phase3\): add resource pool design and implementation plan

Add Resource Pool abstraction design \(1 HD = 1 backend constraint,
internal Resource Slot, atomic Reserve/Release\) and Phase 3 step-by-step
implementation plan covering ResourcePool integration and QEMU Runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs\(phase3\): add reservation state machine with commit/rollback semantics

ResourcePool interface now has four operations \(Reserve, Commit, Rollback,
Release\) instead of two. Reserve creates a tentative hold, Commit confirms
after successful Start, Rollback undoes on Start failure, Release returns
committed resources on Destroy. Added D5 decision documenting the state
machine rationale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
